heading: Deputy Chief of Chaplains
label: 8082a Deputy Chief of Chaplains
text: The Secretary of the Navy may detail as the Deputy Chief of Chaplains an officer of the Chaplain Corps in the grade of commander or above who is on active duty and who has served on active duty in the Chaplain Corps for at least eight years.
notes: Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 5142a of this title1997— struck out “, who is not on the retired list,” after “who is on active duty”.Pub. L. 105–85

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019
